title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 1–4, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I told you so! this is the real krieg! and now he's gonna take over our ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Get on the boat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've gotta get out of here before we're Surroll- nded!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's with all the noise...?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Don KrieG... What about your promise...

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Hey gin! are you alright!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My ship's all worn out,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So I've been wanting a new one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Once my business is done with you, I'll have you get off of this ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Right now, I have around a hundred subordinates on my ship,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And they're all starving and critically wounded.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: So prepare enough water and food,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to feed all 100 men of mine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There are a few who've already starved to death,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WA... TER...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Water...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So make it quick...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're asking us to willingly feed a hundred pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Knowing that they're going to attack us and steal our ship later!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We refuse!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Refuse...? seems like we have a little misunderstanding on our hands.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I wasn't asking whether or not you'd do it...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm ordering you.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And nobody disobeys my orders!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: sanji... I'm sorry... I... never intended for things to turn out this way...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji, you bastard! It's because of you that we're in this m...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey! Where do you think you're going!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: shuffle

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
